title: Sources: Giants trade Lawrence for Bengals pick
content: The Giants are trading defensive tackle Dexter Lawrence to the Bengals in a deal for the No. 10 pick in next week's NFL draft, sources told ESPN.

title: LeBron plays 'triple threat' to spring Game 1 upset
content: With Luka Doncic and Austin Reaves sidelined, LeBron James ignited the Lakers' offense with "a little bit of everything," posting 19 points, 13 assists, 8 rebounds and 2 steals in a Game 1 upset of the Rockets.

title: Buoyed by Brunson, Knicks seal 'hard-fought win'
content: Jalen Brunson scored 22 of his game-high 28 points in the first half as the Knicks posted a 113-102 victory over the Hawks in Game 1 of their Eastern Conference first-round series.

title: Murray's FT dominance irks Wolves, lifts Nuggets
content: Jamal Murray had a tremendous night at the free throw line, making all 16 of his attempts to carry the Nuggets past the Timberwolves in Game 1, during which Nikola Jokic and Aaron Gordon had a quiet first half.

title: Mullins, projected 1st-round pick, to stay at UConn
content: UConn's Braylon Mullins, who was ranked No. 17 on ESPN's NBA draft big board, will look to boost his stock with a second season in Storrs.

title: Oettinger, Stars falter, face familiar 1-0 deficit
content: Continuing an undesirable pattern for fans at American Airlines Center, Dallas lost Game 1 for the ninth time in the past 11 playoff series as Jake Oettinger and the Stars fell 6-1 to the Wild in a contest they quickly trailed 4-0.

title: Mets in free fall after losing 10th straight game
content: The Mets lost their 10th straight game Saturday, the team's longest skid since 2004. Only three teams have made the postseason after a losing streak that long.

title: Skydiver crashes into Hokies' scoreboard, rescued
content: A skydiver was rescued and in stable condition after crashing into the Lane Stadium scoreboard before Virginia Tech's spring football game Saturday.

title: 🏈 Kiper's two-round NFL mock draft
content: Mel Kiper Jr. predicts 64 picks across the first two rounds of the NFL draft, including two potential trades, a few QB landing spots and plenty of impact additions.

title: The fallout of a stunning Dexter Lawrence trade: Four takeaways on the NFL draft, the Bengals, more
content: The Giants traded Lawrence to the Bengals for the No. 10 pick in the draft. What does that say about the NFL's trade market, this draft class and the state of the Bengals?

title: How did the Bengals, Giants do in the Dexter Lawrence II trade?
content: We're handing out report cards on big moves, including the Giants trading Dexter Lawrence II to the Bengals.

title: Kiper's favorites: 15 players who will outperform their draft slot
content: Mel Kiper Jr.'s annual list includes two speedy receivers, three undersized corners and some gritty linemen.

title: Postseason preview: Matchups, biggest questions and what to know
content: Everything you need to know for the Thunder, Pistons, Spurs, Celtics and 16 other teams chasing the 2026 NBA title.

title: Offseason guides: Draft, free agency, trade targets for eliminated teams
content: Summer is here for franchises that missed the playoffs. What lies ahead for the Hornets, Clippers and more?

title: Why Jimmy Johnson cautions Jets that making right picks more valuable than stockpiling them
content: With eight picks in the first and second rounds, New York sits where the former Cowboys coach was 35 years ago.

title: Inside the fallout of the Dianna Russini and Mike Vrabel photos
content: How Dianna Russini and New England Patriots coach Mike Vrabel scrambled to respond to photos published in the New York Post.

title: Man City vs. Arsenal: What to watch for in Premier League title showdown
content: Arsenal's visit to Man City on Sunday will likely decide who wins the league. Here are the keys to the match.

title: The biggest question facing every WNBA team in training camp
content: How will Angel Reese fit the Dream? Will the Wings return to the playoffs? Can Caitlin Clark remain healthy?

title: Playoff concessions go big: NBA, NHL teams unveil new foods
content: It's playoff time in the NBA and NHL, and some teams are breaking out some wild concessions for fans to enjoy in the postseason.

title: Biggest haters funeral: Chris Paul pokes fun at Clippers after play-in tournament loss
content: The LA Clippers saw their season end Wednesday, and an ex-Clipper made sure to rub salt in the wound.

title: Draft guide: Rankings, strategies and more
content: Everything you need to know before your fantasy women's basketball draft, including rankings, tips and news.

title: 10 NFL draft prospects to put on your fantasy radar -- and three others to monitor
content: With the NFL draft nearly upon us, it's time to think about how the top prospects will fare in fantasy.

title: Mason Miller tops all pitchers? CJ Abrams goes 30-100-30? Don't be surprised
content: Eric Karabell looks into the crystal ball to tell fantasy baseball managers what might come to pass in the not-too-distant future.

title: Transfer rumors, news: PSG move for Arsenal star Martinelli
content: Paris Saint-Germain sporting director Luis Campos has held a meeting with the representatives of Arsenal winger Gabriel Martinelli. Transfer Talk has the latest.

title: Third language row: Demand for clarification from Karnataka Education Department
content: Lack of clarity during the ongoing academic year’s examination period has pushed lakhs of students into mental stress and uncertainty, educationist Shabbir Mustafa said

title: DMK and its allies shattered women’s dreams, says Edappadi K. Palaniswami
content: “The DMK alliance does not want to give reservation for women,” the AIADMK general secreatary Palaniswami charged

title: Minister launches PM Surya Ghar Utsav in Banganapalle
content: Through this initiative, SC and ST beneficiaries are being provided the opportunity to install solar panels with a full 100% subsidy, the Minister for Roads and Buildings said

title: ‘No one could ever call me anti-women’: Tharoor shares details of conversation with Rijiju
content: The Congress MP also said women are by far the better half of the species — 'Humans 2.0' — and deserve representation in Parliament and in every institution

title: Four feared dead in major accident on NH-50 in Karnataka’s Vijayanagara district
content: Preliminary reports indicate that a garlic-laden lorry from Haryana, allegedly driven in a rash and negligent manner, first struck two motorcycles about three kilometres before the main accident site

title: Operating nuclear plants was ‘lifetime commitment’: Experts
content: The Sustainable Harnessing and Advancement of Nuclear Energy for Transforming India (SHANTI) Act, 2025, is to help India raise its installed nuclear power capacity from the existing 8.7 gigawatt (GW) to 100 GW by 2047

title: Congress confident of winning all 13 seats in Kozhikode
content: DCC president K. Praveenkumar says the victory margin of UDF candidates will cross the five-digit figure

title: Bus falls into gorge in Rajasthan's Ajmer; two killed, 31 injured
content: The accident took place a little ahead of Sanjhisar when the bus veered off the main road and fell into the gorge

title: Consecration ceremony begins for India’s first Saivite shrine
content: According to the ASI, the temple dates back to the period between the 2nd and 3rd centuries B.C., as confirmed by excavations within the shrine that uncovered the square rail and the ‘Manusha Linga’

title: Tamil Nadu Assembly election: CEO flags off marathon for awareness
content: About 3,000 people took part in the event aimed at creating awareness to ensure a 100% polling percentage in the April 23 Assembly election in Tamil Nadu

title: Tamil Nadu election 2026: Omalur constituency residents seek cold storage facility for marigold, market price for land given for airport expansion
content: The proposed yarn colouring park at Jahir Ammapalayam will affect 16 villages under Omalur, said a resident of Karuppur, and added that the project must be dropped.

title: PM Modi playing politics in the name of women’s reservation: CM Siddaramaiah
content: He said that the delimitation exercise being introduced by the Centre, in its present form, would be extremely unfair to southern States

title: Is India’s Maoist insurgency finally over?
content: What remains of the CPI (Maoist) after recent setbacks? How did security operations weaken the Maoist movement so sharply? What internal divisions and ideological shifts weakened the organisation? Is there any chance of a Maoist revival in the future?

title: With cost of inputs rising and exports disrupted, textile units in Perambalur take a hit
content: Industry sources said the prices of key raw materials such as polyester fibre and synthetic yarn, largely derived from petroleum products, have increased sharply in recent weeks

title: Eight-year-old dies after snakebite while asleep at home in Kerala’s Thrissur; brother critical
content: It is suspected that the snake may have entered the house seeking relief from the intense heat outside and remained unnoticed as it hid beneath the pillow

title: Kerala poll: Deputy CM debate resurfaces as IUML asserts eligibility for post
content: Party State president Syed Sadikali Shihab Thangal had, during the electioneering, made it clear that the party would not stake a claim for Deputy Chief Minister’s post.

title: What led to the Noida workers’ protest?
content: What are the key demands of Noida workers? Why are workers dissatisfied with current wages? How are minimum wages determined in Noida? How has the U.P. government responded? What steps has the government taken to address workers’ concerns?

title: Tamil Nadu election 2026: Gobichettipalayam constituency in focus after Sengottaiyan’s exit from AIADMK
content: Predominantly agrarian, Gobichettipalayam is known for its picturesque fields and brimming canals. — landscapes that have featured in numerous Tamil films, earning it the sobriquet “Chinna Kodambakkam.”

title: Kerala Assembly Elections 2026: Congress, CPI(M) question delay in poll data publication
content: Leader of the Opposition V.D. Satheesan writes to Chief Election Commissioner of India, drawing his attention to the fact that there is inordinate delay in publishing the official data related to the Kerala Assembly Elections

title: Thieves loot passengers in Bengaluru-Narsapur special train
content: The GRP, RPF and the Law and Order police launched a hunt to nab the thieves, said Senior Divisional Security Commissioner Shanmuga Vadivel

title: Total value of election-related seizures in Villupuram district reach ₹89.48 lakh
content: While conducting vehicle checks, the teams had been seizing cash found carried without valid documents at various places in seven Assembly constituencies across Villupuram

title: One arrested for hurling a glass bottle at the convoy of TVK candidate in Saidapet
content: Sampath, a car mechanic, hurled an empty liquor bottle at TVK members when the party’s Saidapet candidate Arul Prakasam was canvassing votes in the locality

title: Tamil Nadu election 2026: Improvement of tourism facilities a key demand in Valparai constituency
content: Valparai (Reserve) Assembly constituency has two segments, one in the plains and the other is the hills, where the prime occupation is tea cultivation.

title: Deeply unfortunate that PM chose to mislead nation over women's quota bill: Mamata
content: Mamata Banerjee alleged that the central government was plotting to push through the delimitation exercise by "using women as a shield"

title: Women’s Bill being used to dilute southern representation, says Kanimozhi
content: Campaigning for M. H. Jawahirullah, candidate of the DMK-led alliance from Nagapattinam, she addressed voters near Nellukadai Mariamman Temple and sought support for the alliance

title: Vice-President Radhakrishnan meets Sri Lankan President Dissanayake, discusses Indian housing project
content: Mr. Radhakrishnan laid emphasis on India’s ‘Neighbourhood First’ policy and developmental bilateral cooperation, officials said.

title: Opposition unity, neither automatic nor obvious, sinks Constitutional Amendment Bill
content: Till last week of March, government interlocutors faced no outright opposition to proposed legislation on seat expansion, delimitation to expedite implementation of women’s reservation.

title: Telangana CM Revanth meets Governor, seeking clearance of Kodandaram and Azharuddin’s nomination as MLCs
content: The names of Prof M. Kodandaram and Mohammad Azharuddin, which had been approved earlier by the State Cabinet, remain pending with the Lok Bhavan since the last Governor Jishnu Dev Varma, who is now transferred to Maharashtra

title: Tamil Nadu election 2026: Gangavalli constituency traders demand building for State’s second largest vegetable market
content: Farming is the primary occupation of the people in the constituency, which also houses dozens of sago mills. Tapioca is cultivated on over 700 hectares, corn (400 hectares), turmeric (300 hectares) and paddy (100 hectares). Sugarcane is cultivated in large scale in Thalaivasal, Veeraganur, and Tammampatti.

title: Tamil Nadu election 2026: Poompuhar constituency’s  neglect, climate stress and a tight electoral race
content: The constituency includes 13 fishing hamlets, notably Tharangambadi and Poompuhar, where basic infrastructure remains inadequate.

title: Justice is served in Sattankulam
content: The judgment in the Sattankulam custodial torture case arrived with the fragrance of justice. The court found nine policemen guilty of the torture and murder of Jayaraj and Benicks, and sentenced them to death. That the father-son duo were beaten to death for keeping their shop open 15 minutes after COVID curfew — as claimed by the police but debunked by the CBI probe — was horrific, but the process of law that followed was bone chilling. That injustice is what the Madurai First Additional District and Sessions judge corrected, activists and the victims’ kin tell C. Palanivel Rajan

title: Chhattisgarh Vedanta power plant blast: Death toll rises to 24
content: "Eight to ten individuals, including Vedanta Group Chairman Anil Agarwal and plant head Devendra Patel, have been named in the FIR. If more persons are found responsible during the investigation, their names will be added," Sakti Superintendent of Police Prafull Thakur had said.

title: A.P. records weakest MGNREGA performance since bifurcation; work, income, workforce shrink sharply
content: Scheduled Caste and Scheduled Tribe households bore a substantial share of the income loss; together, they accounted for ₹484 crore, or about 40% of the total decline in wage expenditure

title: Dr. Bharti nominated to WHO’s oversight committee for neglected tropical diseases
content: Dr. Bharti has been included as an independent expert of neglected zoonotic diseases in the 18 membered oversight committee

title: Jana Sena Party eyes expansion in Kerala
content: MLC Nagababu emphasised that though politics in Kerala might differ from that in A.P., the JSP’s core ideologies remain the same regardless of region or language

title: Naidu to anchor NDA’s Tamil Nadu push with rallies and roadshows
content: N. Chandrababu Naidu’s visit is aimed at energising party cadre, strengthening voter engagement, and reinforcing the NDA’s development-oriented narrative.

title: At least 404 candidates in Tamil Nadu have serious criminal cases against them: Report
content: Tamil Nadu Election Watch (TNEW) State coordinator P. Joseph Victor Raj released the report and it was received by Jayaram Venkatesan, State Coordinator of Arappor Iyakkam

title: Bihar CM slams opposition over women's quota bill
content: Samrat Choudhary said it was a "black day" when the Constitution amendment bill fell in Lok Sabha and "women's reservation was mocked by parties like Congress and TMC"

title: Tamil Nadu election 2026: Virugambakkam, a fast-developing constituency reels under multiple civic issues
content: Hailing from diverse socio-economic backgrounds, the residents of Virugambakkam constituency demand that pattas be issued to people living on government poramboke land in a few areas; they also demand that a public library be built

title: PM Modi speaks with Pawan Kalyan; enquires about his health
content: Mr. Kalyan has thanked the Prime Minister for enquiring about his health and said he was grateful to PM Modi for his kind words and for speaking with him

title: Tamil Nadu election 2026: Delay in proposed textile park sparks concern among Gudiyatham  constituency residents
content: Consumers get water supply once a week, forcing them to walk for a few kilometres to fetch a few pots of water for domestic use

title: Tamil Nadu election 2026: Kumbakonam constituency longs for district status, infrastructure push ahead
content: While the civic body points fingers at the Water Resources Department for the poor maintenance of irrigation channels criss-crossing the town for the mosquito menace, the latter blames the civic body for the garbage and other non-biodegradable material that pile along these channels leading to mosquito breeding

title: Trinamool ‘betrayed’ women, will be punished in West Bengal elections, says Modi
content: “We have seen how the TMC betrayed women in Parliament. The TMC conspired with the Congress to prevent the passage of the Bill as it is against women’s empowerment,” Mr. Modi said

title: SC issues pan-India directions for road safety, says expressways should not become corridor of peril
content: A Bench of Justices J.K. Maheshwari and A.S. Chandurkar pointed out that national highways constitute 2% of India’s total road length but account for nearly 30% of all road fatalities

title: Congress, DMK opposition to ‘Women’s Reservation Bill’ won’t be tolerated: Amit Shah
content: Women have been denied crucial opportunities due to the actions of the Congress and the DMK, and such practices will not be tolerated, Amit Shah said

title: Andhra Minister NMD Farooq flags off final batch of Haj pilgrims from Vijayawada
content: The Minister conveyed his best wishes and expressed hope that their sacred journey to Mecca and Medina would be completed safely and successfully

title: What the ‘science’ of delimitation and fertility struggles to capture
content: Readers familiar with the politics of delimitation will find that the scholarly literature catches up to their intuitions only slowly and incompletely. There are good reasons why

title: Pune airport runway shut after IAF aircraft 'hard landing'
content: The airport uses a 'dual-use model', integrating civilian commercial operations with an active Air Force station

title: Student deaths in NIT Kurukshetra: CPI(M) MP Brittas seeks Education Minister's intervention
content: In his letter, John Brittas noted that four students have died at the institute between February and April this year

title: ED conducts raids at residences of senior cop, businessman in Kolkata over ‘money laundering’
content: The Enforcement Directorate is searching locations linked to Kolkata Police Deputy Commissioner Shantanu Sinha Biswas and businessman Joy Kamdar in the Sona Pappu case under the PMLA

title: Actor Parthiban moves Madras High Court seeking ‘no caste, no religion’ certificate
content: The actor says the Tamil Nadu government is “sleeping over the matter” despite an order passed by a Division Bench of the High Court on June 10, 2025

title: Air quality poor in Delhi
content: The weather department has predicted a partly cloudy sky with the maximum temperature expected to touch 40 degrees Celsius

title: Tamil Nadu election 2026: Densely populated Maduravoyal constituency sees signs of progress while some civic issues linger
content: Garbage disposal remains a concern as unsegregated waste is left exposed for days, attracting stray animals; encroachments along the banks of Cooum river have narrowed parts of the waterway; apart from such issues, residents say that there have been visible improvements in recent years

title: West Bengal Pradesh Congress says no post-poll alliance
content: Bengal Congress Committee chief tries to dispel reports on the possibility of post-poll tie-up with TMC; the Congress is contesting all Assembly seats on its own strength in the State, ending a decade-long understanding with the CPI(M)-led Left Front

title: Tamil Nadu election 2026: Disappointed over confusion post bifurcation, Tirukkoyilur constituency electors feel neglected
content: Tirukkoyilur Assembly Constituency is witnessing a generational shift with sitting MLA and DMK strongman K. Ponmudi having been been denied seat and replaced by his son and former MP Gowtham Sigamani. For now, the DMK treads a tricky path of battling anti-incumbency while the AIADMK hopes to cash in on it

title: Man United close in on UCL return by beating increasingly toxic Chelsea
content: two young managers trying to boost long-term job prospects at their respective clubs . a game of huge importance was decided by fine margins, and it was united who edged it . matheus Cunha scored the only goal in a 1-0 win as carrick's team took a big step toward a return to Europe's top club competition .

title: Jaipur nikah, Kashmir trail: How LeT's 'Khargosh' used fake passport to flee India
content: A top Lashkar-e-Taiba operative, Umer Harris alias “Khargosh,” has reportedly fled India to Saudi Arabia using a forged passport. The operative, originally from Khyber Pakhtunkhwa, married under an assumed identity in Jaipur, which aided his passport application. This revelation highlights significant loopholes in India's verification systems.

title: Slain Supreme Leader Ali Khamenei yet to be buried. Are Iranian officials too 'afraid' to do so?
content: Iran's Supreme Leader Ali Khamenei's burial remains uncertain over a month after his death, with officials citing security concerns and an "unprecedented turnout" expectation.  A joint US-Israeli airstrike on February 28 escalated into broader conflict, delaying the planned state funeral.  Concerns include potential Israeli strikes and nationalist counter-rallies, with Mashhad being considered as a burial site.

title: Zoho founder Sridhar Vembu to engineers on how to survive in AI era
content: Zoho founder Sridhar Vembu advises software engineers to prioritize deep domain expertise over just programming skills to succeed in the AI era. While AI accelerates prototypes, he emphasizes that delivering security, reliability, and compliance is what customers truly value. Vembu urges teams to focus on enhancing customer experience with AI, not just programmer productivity, by eliminating unnecessary complexity.

title: Deepika expecting 2nd baby with Ranveer, makes announcement via social media
content: Deepika Padukone and Ranveer Singh are expecting their second child, with Deepika sharing a cute social media post hinting at her baby bump. The couple, married in 2018 in Italy, already welcomed daughter Dua in 2024, and fans are thrilled as their family grows once again.

title: India-US trade deal: Three-day talks to begin from April 20; what to expect
content: India and the United States will resume trade talks next week in Washington. A delegation of Indian officials will meet their US counterparts. Discussions will focus on the first phase of a proposed bilateral trade agreement. Recent changes in US tariff policy necessitate a review of the earlier finalized trade structure.

title: 'Mr Prime Minister, speak from ... ': Mamata's dare to Modi over women's quota bill address
content: West Bengal CM Mamata Banerjee hit back at PM Modi's criticism regarding the Women's Reservation Bill, accusing him of misleading the nation. She defended her party, TMC, stating its consistent support for women's representation. Banerjee clarified her opposition is to the delimitation exercise, which she believes is a political ploy, and questioned the bill's delayed implementation and linkage to delimitation.

title: OpenAI exec Srinivas Narayanan leaves to spend time with ageing parents in India
content: Srinivas Narayanan, OpenAI's CTO for B2B applications, is departing the company next week after nearly three years. He plans to visit his parents in India before considering future professional endeavors. Narayanan, who previously served as VP of Engineering, shared his departure on LinkedIn, calling his tenure at the AI firm 'three incredible years'.

title: Market recap: Eight of top 10 firms add Rs 1.87 lakh cr in mcap; Airtel biggest gainer
content: Indian markets concluded the week on a positive note, with the combined market value of the top ten companies surging by over Rs 1.87 lakh crore. Bharti Airtel emerged as the leading gainer, adding Rs 58,831 crore to its valuation. This uptrend was supported by easing geopolitical tensions and a positive risk sentiment.

title: Verizon CEO Dan Schulman says ‘not scared of’ Anthropic’s Mythos: ‘It is just a…’
content: Verizon CEO Dan Schulman is embracing AI, utilizing Anthropic's Mythos model to transform operations. He believes network superiority alone isn't enough, emphasizing a human-centric approach to customer experience and simplifying promotions.  Recognizing AI's impact, Verizon has launched a $20 million retraining fund for employees, urging other CEOs to follow suit.

title: ‘You can’t breach a contract you never received’: Muzarabani’s camp slams PSL ban
content: Zimbabwean pacer Blessing Muzarabani faces a two-year PSL ban for withdrawing from a deal, but his agency vehemently denies any wrongdoing. They assert no formal contract was signed, making the ban unjustified.  While the league cites a breach of commitment, the agency calls the penalty excessive and urges its withdrawal, highlighting an administrative error amidst Muzarabani's IPL success.

title: Two Indians shot dead outside Italy gurdwara during Baisakhi gathering
content: Two Indian men were fatally shot outside a gurdwara in Covo, Italy, on Friday night after a Vaisakhi festival gathering. Authorities are investigating the incident as a potential "coldly planned execution," with initial findings suggesting the attack was not spontaneous. Shell casings were recovered, and a witness described the shooter as an Indian who also frequented the place of worship.

title: ‘Turn around immediately’: Moment Iranian Navy blocked Indian vessel in Strait of Hormuz - Watch
content: Two Indian-flagged tankers, Bhagya Lakshmi and Sanmar Herald, were denied passage and reportedly fired upon by Iranian gunboats in the Strait of Hormuz. Crew members of Bhagya Lakshmi were told to turn back, while Sanmar Herald reported being fired upon despite prior clearance. India has raised concerns with Iran over the safety of merchant shipping.

title: ‘A little tacky’: Trump reviews his own McDonald’s moment
content: A staged Oval Office McDonald's delivery to celebrate a tax policy has drawn criticism, with President Trump himself calling the event "tacky." The DoorDash driver, Sharon Simmons, who previously advocated for the policy, was highlighted for alleged savings. DoorDash clarified it was a planned event, not a genuine delivery, defending Simmons' participation.

title: ‘I don’t care about strike rate’: SRH star’s bold stance after win over CSK
content: Heinrich Klaasen proved his worth for Sunrisers Hyderabad with a crucial innings. He addressed concerns about his scoring pace, stating that adapting to match situations is more important than strike rate. Klaasen's mature approach helped SRH post a competitive total. The team secured a close victory against Chennai Super Kings. This win highlights the impact of Klaasen's contributions.

title: ‘Mentioned Congress 59 times, women barely’: Kharge leads opposition charge against PM's speech
content: Opposition leaders Mallikarjun Kharge, Mamata Banerjee, and D.K. Shivakumar have strongly criticized Prime Minister Narendra Modi, accusing him of misrepresenting facts regarding the women's reservation bill. They contend the government used the bill as a political shield for delimitation, not genuine empowerment, and that the bill's passage was deliberately stalled. Leaders emphasized Congress's long-standing support for women's representation.

title: Iran war impact: India's growth stays firm at 6.8%; oil shocks threaten US outlook
content: India's economy shows resilience amidst global turmoil. SBI Research projects strong GDP growth between 6.8% and 7.1% for FY27. The nation navigates oil shocks from a position of strength. Domestic fundamentals provide a buffer. Potential risks like Super El Nino are noted. Inflation is expected at 4.5% with fiscal deficit around 4.5-4.6%.

title: No more ‘corridors of peril’: SC rolls out strict highway safety norms
content: The Supreme Court has mandated nationwide road safety improvements, banning heavy vehicle parking on national highways and restricting new roadside structures.  Authorities must ensure compliance within 60 days, with district magistrates overseeing inspections. Task forces will be formed to address accident-prone 'blackspots' and enhance surveillance, aiming to prevent avoidable fatalities.

title: 13-year-old girl on way to school, kidnapped, gangraped in Madhya Pradesh
content: A 13-year-old girl was abducted and gang-raped by two men in Madhya Pradesh's Maihar district. Police rescued the minor late at night after breaking down a bolted door. Both accused, aged 25 and 35, have been apprehended. The victim reported being lured into a room before the assault. One of the arrested men is a known repeat offender.

title: 'Free healthcare, Rs 36,000 yearly': PM Modi's women-focused poll pitch in Bengal
content: Prime Minister Narendra Modi accused the Trinamool Congress of opposing the women's reservation bill, claiming the party worked against greater political representation for Bengal's daughters. He asserted the BJP prioritizes women's empowerment and safety, promising improved welfare delivery if elected in the state.

title: IPL 2026: KKR get timely boost as Rs 18 crore recruit finally joins squad
content: Kolkata Knight Riders have received a significant boost with the arrival of Sri Lankan pace sensation Matheesha Pathirana, who has cleared fitness tests. Despite his presence, the team management might be cautious about his immediate inclusion. KKR, struggling with six winless matches and tactical questions, faces a strong Rajasthan Royals side.

title: Vijay’s TVK backs independent candidate in Salem’s Edappadi, calls for ‘fitting lesson’
content: Actor-turned-politician Vijay's Tamilaga Vettri Kazhagam (TVK) will back an independent candidate in Edappadi after their nominee's disqualification. Vijay urged voters to support K Premakumar, calling it a "fitting lesson" against alleged suppression of their symbol. This strategic shift occurs as TVK, launched in February, contests its first Assembly elections against established Dravidian parties.

title: Caught drinking in MP hospital bed, patient shoots at doctor, flees
content: A 23-year-old patient at a community health centre in Satna allegedly opened fire at a doctor after being caught drinking on his hospital bed. The patient, identified as Shivam Dwivedi, then fled the scene on a bike. The incident has raised serious security concerns at the facility.

title: ‘Drishyam 3’ director Abhishek Pathak and actress Shivaleeka Oberoi welcome baby girl
content: Director Abhishek Pathak (Drishyam 3) and wife Shivaleeka Oberoi welcomed their baby girl on Akshaya Tritiya, April 19—three years after their 2023 Goa wedding. The couple announced: "Our little Goddess Laxmi has arrived." Celebs like Ishita Dutta congratulated them.

title: 'His mind appears to be cluttered': Ashwin's blunt take on CSK captain Gaikwad
content: Chennai Super Kings are struggling in IPL 2026, currently seventh with a 2-4 record. Skipper Ruturaj Gaikwad's form is a major concern, with just 82 runs in six matches. Former India spinner R Ashwin believes Gaikwad missed a prime opportunity to regain form against Sunrisers Hyderabad, suggesting he's under immense pressure.

title: Rs 20,000 crore gold, silver rush: What will people buy this Akshaya Tritiya?
content: India's gold and silver markets anticipate over Rs 20,000 crore in sales this Akshay Tritiya, a rise from last year's Rs 16,000 crore, despite record-high prices. Consumers are shifting towards lightweight jewelry and silver, with a notable decline in the volume of metals purchased, indicating value growth driven by price escalation rather than increased consumption.

title: India’s LPG consumption drops 13% in March amid Middle East supply disruptions
content: India's cooking gas use plunged 13% in March, hit by Middle East conflict-induced supply snags. While household needs were prioritized, commercial LPG consumption saw a drastic drop. Domestic production was boosted to compensate for import disruptions, though overall fiscal year LPG demand still grew. Jet fuel demand remained flat, but petrol and diesel consumption showed strength.

title: Ayush Mhatre injury update: CSK's Michael Hussey shares major concern
content: Chennai Super Kings face a significant injury blow as young batter Ayush Mhatre suffered a hamstring tear during their match against Sunrisers Hyderabad. Mhatre was seen limping badly after pulling up midway through a run, and batting coach Michael Hussey confirmed the injury looks "really bad" and could be a "big loss" for the team.

title: Caught on cam: Fan's 'black magic' act during IPL match; CSK star falls next ball
content: A Sunrisers Hyderabad fan's alleged 'black magic' ritual involving a lemon coincided with Shivam Dube's dismissal, sparking debate online. SRH secured a 10-run victory over Chennai Super Kings, with captain Ishan Kishan praising his young bowlers' execution despite feeling his team was short on runs. SRH next faces Delhi Capitals.

title: ‘You gave me clearance to go': Indian vessel’s frantic distress call during Hormuz firing revealed
content: Two India-flagged vessels, the Sanmar Herald and Jag Arnav, were targeted by Iranian gunboats in the Strait of Hormuz, forcing a convoy of 14 ships to abort transit. The incident caused confusion over passage instructions, with multiple vessels turning back. India has lodged a protest with Iran, urging safe passage for merchant shipping.

title: 'Clear way for marriage': 5-year-old killed by mother’s partner in Telangana
content: A five-year-old boy was brutally killed by his mother's live-in partner in Kamareddy. The accused allegedly smothered and beat the child after his mother left home. Police arrested both the partner and the mother, stating they planned to eliminate the boy due to his mental health issues to facilitate their marriage. The eight-year-old sister is the sole eyewitness.

title: Will real estate prices in Gurugram continue to soar? What experts are saying
content: Gurugram is transforming into a prime real estate hub, driven by infrastructure upgrades and strong residential demand, especially in New Gurugram.  The region's growth is further bolstered by its emergence as a logistics and commercial center.  New micro-markets are attracting end-users and investors with improved connectivity and lifestyle amenities, promising significant future value.

title: 'Bhooth Bangla' earns over Rs 60 cr worldwide in just two days
content: Akshay Kumar and Wamiqa Gabbi's horror-comedy 'Bhooth Bangla' has made a strong debut, grossing Rs 42 crore in India and Rs 60.50 crore worldwide within its first two days. Directed by Priyadarshan, the film marks a reunion for the director and Akshay Kumar after 15 years.

title: Darshan Kumar passes away at 70; Mika Singh shares heartfelt tribute
content: T-Series owner Darshan Kumar, brother of founder Gulshan Kumar, passed away in Delhi at 70. Known for his behind-the-scenes support of artists, his contributions earned him deep respect within the music industry. Singer Mika Singh shared an emotional tribute, highlighting Kumar's role in launching and supporting numerous talents.

title: West playoffs: Nuggets and Lakers win as the playoffs begin
content: the 2026 NBA playoffs began on "inside the NBA" the Denver Nuggets and Minnesota Timberwolves kicked things off for the Western Conference on Saturday . the los Angeles lakers beat the Houston Rockets 107-98 in the day's final game .

title: WrestleMania 42 takeaways: Cody Rhodes retains title; multiple new champs crowned
content: Randy Orton takes an RKO from Cody Rhodes . he retains the undisputed WWE Championship . there is much to talk about after night one of WrestleMania 42 at Allegiant Stadium in Las Vegas .

title: One year later: Who won the Jags-Browns draft-day trade for Travis Hunter?
content: a year ago, the seeds for a blockbuster NFL draft trade were planted . the browns had their eye on wide receiver/cornerback Travis Hunter . it became expected that the Tennessee Titans were going to select quarterback Cam Ward .

title: Wyshynski predicts the entire 2026 Stanley Cup playoff bracket
content: the 2026 Stanley Cup playoffs are here, and they're weird . the Buffalo Sabres , who last made the playoffs when "Fast Five" was in theaters, are here . but that's why the tournament is the greatest postseason in sports: the unpredictability .

title: East playoffs: The Cavs and Knicks roll on the opening day
content: Donovan Mitchell's slam dunk extends Cavaliers' fourth-quarter lead . the new york Knicks beat the Atlanta Hawks 113-102 in the east playoffs . there's what matters most and what to watch as the playoffs continue .

title: Gujarat Migrant Shop Owner Left Devastated As Life Savings Turn to Ashes
content: Behind the headlines of communal tension and administrative crackdowns in Dhandhuka lies the harrowing story of Mohammad Sabir, a migrant from Bihar whose dreams of a better life were incinerated in a single afternoon.

title: Ex Union Minister Dinesh Trivedi Appointed Bangladesh High Commissioner
content: Former Union minister Dinesh Trivedi, known for his strong policy interventions, has been appointed India's High Commissioner to Bangladesh

title: "Vizhinjam Has Answered The Call": Shashi Tharoor's Post Amid Hormuz Crisis
content: Congress MP Shashi Tharoor has shared how Vizhinjam port has emerged as a reliable maritime hub amid a global shipping crisis.

title: Rs 9,26,02,45,300: What Ukrainian Strikes Is Costing Russia Each Day
content: Kyiv's Unmanned Systems Forces claimed that daily oil shipments through key Russian ports have fallen by around 8,80,000 barrels.

title: Noble Effort Derailed Due To Opposition's Petty Politics: PM On Women's Bill
content: PM Modi also attacked DMK for its staunch opposition to the delimitation exercise, saying the number of Lok Sabha seats in Tamil Nadu would have increased, but the ruling party blocked the central government's move.

title: 58 Lakh SIR Deletions Accounted For, Bengal's Top Poll Officer Tells NDTV
content: West Bengal elections: Manoj Kumar Agarwal stressed that his role was only supervising the SIR process, and he had done his job with full neutrality.

title: "Impossible For Others To Pass When We Can't": Iran On Closing Hormuz
content: The dueling blockades have complicated Pakistani-led mediation attempts and raised questions about whether the two-week truce can be extended.

title: US-Iran War Live Updates: Iran Says US' "Maximalist" Demands Stall Face-To-Face Talks
content: US-Iran War, Ceasefire, Peace Talks Updates: The war is in its eighth week and has sent oil prices surging because of the closure of the Strait of Hormuz.

title: "An Insult To Lebanon That US Dictates Its Text": Hezbollah Chief On Ceasefire With Israel
content: The truce came days after Lebanon and Israel's ambassadors to the US met in Washington ahead of planned direct negotiations between the two countries, the first in decades.

title: UK's Keir Starmer Looks To European Union As Iran War Strains Ties With US
content: Donald Trump's unpredictability and stream of insults towards US's historic ally is adding impetus to Keir Starmer's bid to deepen ties with the European Union.

title: Rat Poison Found In HiPP Baby Food Jar In Austria, Products Recalled
content: Police said that a sample from one of the 190-gram jars of "Carrots and Potatoes" baby food reported by a customer had tested positive for rat poison.

title: PM's "Maha Jungle Raj" Jibe At Trinamool For Opposing Women's Quota Bill
content: PM Modi said that he tried to ensure that women get 33% reservation, but the Trinamool "conspired" with the Congress to prevent such a law.

title: 2 Indian Men Shot Dead Outside Gurdwara In Italy
content: The victims were identified as Raginder Singh, 48, a resident of Covo, and Gurmit Singh, 48, from Agnadello.

title: On Camera, Truck Causes Chain Collision In Karnataka, 4 Dead
content: The accident led to heavy traffic congestion on the highway, with vehicles stuck for nearly three kilometres on both sides of the road.

title: Why US Warship Abraham Lincoln Repeats The Same Menu Every 21 Days
content: An aircraft carrier feeds around 5,100 sailors and aircrew daily and prepares more than 17,300 meals every single day.

title: Death Count In Chhattisgarh Vedanta Power Plant Blast Climbs To 24
content: The explosion occurred in a steel tube carrying high-pressure steam from the boiler to the turbine at the Vedanta Ltd power plant located in Singhitarai village.

title: Why Was Women's Quota Bill Brought At This Time? Centre Releases FAQs
content: If cleared, these Bills would have paved the way for 33% reservation for women in the Lok Sabha as early as the 2029 general elections.
